t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Country of residence name. Resolved from Dim_Country.Name via CountryID. Passthrough from BI_DB_CIDFirstDates.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Customer registration date. MIN(RegisteredDemo, RegisteredReal) — whichever happened first.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Customer registration date. MIN(RegisteredDemo, RegisteredReal) — whichever happened first. CAST to DATE from BI_DB_CIDFirstDates.registered.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: First date customer reached verification level 2. MIN(FromDateID) WHERE VerificationLevelID=2. Backfilled from level 3 if level 2 not found.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: First date customer reached verification level 2. MIN(FromDateID) WHERE VerificationLevelID=2. Backfilled from level 3 if level 2 not found. CAST to DATE from BI_DB_CIDFirstDates.VerificationLevel2Date.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: First date customer reached verification level 3 (fully verified). MIN(FromDateID) WHERE VerificationLevelID=3. Backfills levels 1 and 2 if not already set.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: First date customer reached verification level 3 (fully verified). MIN(FromDateID) WHERE VerificationLevelID=3. Backfills levels 1 and 2 if not already set. CAST to DATE from BI_DB_CIDFirstDates.VerificationLevel3Date.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: First successful deposit date. Read directly from Dim_Customer.FirstDepositDate (alias `dc`), which is sourced from CustomerFinanceDB.Customer.FirstTimeDeposits (GlobalFTD service) with FTDRecoveryDate override logic in SP_Dim_Customer. 1900-01-01 means no deposit (sentinel). Filter with `YEAR(FirstDepositDate) != 1900`.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: First successful deposit date. Read directly from Dim_Customer.FirstDepositDate, which is sourced from CustomerFinanceDB.Customer.FirstTimeDeposits (GlobalFTD service) with FTDRecoveryDate override logic in SP_Dim_Customer. 1900-01-01 means no deposit (sentinel). Filter with `YEAR(FTD_Date) != 1900`. CAST to DATE from BI_DB_CIDFirstDates.FirstDepositDate.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Dropped '(alias `dc`)' and adapted column name in filter — no semantic loss

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Amount of first successful deposit in USD. Read directly from Dim_Customer.FirstDepositAmount (alias `dc`), which is sourced from CustomerFinanceDB.Customer.FirstTimeDeposits (FTDAmountInUsd). Default 0.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Amount of first successful deposit in USD. Read directly from Dim_Customer.FirstDepositAmount, which is sourced from CustomerFinanceDB.Customer.FirstTimeDeposits (FTDAmountInUsd). Default 0. Passthrough from BI_DB_CIDFirstDates.FirstDepositAmount (renamed).

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: First position open date (manual or copy). MIN(Occurred) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE ActionTypeID IN (1,2) AND rn=1.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: First position open date (manual or copy). MIN(Occurred) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE ActionTypeID IN (1,2) AND rn=1. CAST to DATE from BI_DB_CIDFirstDates.FirstPosOpenDate.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Customer lifecycle status (e.g., Active, Blocked, Pending). DEFAULT 0. Source: Ext_FSC_Real_Customer_Customer.PlayerStatusID (CC). FK to Dim_PlayerStatus.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Customer lifecycle status. Source: Ext_FSC_Real_Customer_Customer.PlayerStatusID (CC). FK to Dim_PlayerStatus. Passthrough from Fact_SnapshotCustomer. Note: statuses 2 (Blocked), 4 (Blocked Upon Request), 13 (Pending Verification) are excluded by the SP WHERE clause.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Dropped '(e.g., Active, Blocked, Pending)' and 'DEFAULT 0' — compensated by adding SP exclusion context

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Human-readable restriction state label. Unique per status. Used in BackOffice UI, compliance reports, and monitoring dashboards. Note: some values have trailing spaces in live data -- apply RTRIM() for string comparisons.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Human-readable restriction state label. Unique per status. Used in BackOffice UI, compliance reports, and monitoring dashboards. Note: some values have trailing spaces in live data — apply RTRIM() for string comparisons. Dim-lookup from Dim_PlayerStatus.Name.

issues.problem: Description abbreviated vs upstream Dim_Regulation.Name — drops 'Used in V_Dim_Customer and analytics dashboards. Values match production Dictionary.Regulation.Name'. Less informative than Regulation column's description for the same upstream source.
Drops 'FK to Dim_Customer (if exists)' from upstream FSC.RealCID description. The FK reference would help analysts understand join paths.
No explicit Phase Gate Checklist section with P2/P3 checkboxes. Footer says 'Phases: 11/14' but data evidence audit trail is not verifiable from the wiki alone.
Drops upstream example values '(e.g., Active, Blocked, Pending)' which help analysts unfamiliar with the numeric IDs.

Regulation join documented as 'sc.RegulationID = dr1.DWHRegulationID' — correct per SP code, but Dim_Regulation wiki notes DWHRegulationID is always equal to ID and recommends using ID. No functional impact.

verdict.regeneration_feedback: No regeneration needed — PASS at 9.40. Optional polish: (1) Add 'Values match production Dictionary.Regulation.Name' to DesignatedRegulation description. (2) Consider adding a Phase Gate Checklist section for audit transparency.

skipped_phases: Phase Gate Checklist section not present as standalone section
